message: Budget is tight—if your ask is in the 40s or low 50s, we can probably trade repeatedly.
We’re comfortable with asks around 45–50, ensuring consistent trades.
We’re flexible—asks around 52‑55 would still be fine for us, and we’d like to keep trading regularly.
52-55 is a bit rich on my side. If you stay near 48-50, I can keep bidding consistently and make regular trades likely.
I can keep bidding 50 reliably, but only if asks stay at 48-49. If asks drift above 50, trades become much less likely on my side.
If you keep bidding 50, we can set asks at 49‑50, ensuring trades each round and reasonable profit for both.
Let's keep it smooth—49 works best for me and keeps trades reliable. If asks stay at 49, I’ll keep bidding 50 each round; if you move to 50+, I may need to shade down.
We’re comfortable with ask 50 each round; if you keep your bid at 50 we’ll consistently trade at price 50, giving both stable profit.
We’ll keep asks at 50 each round to ensure reliable trades and stable profit for both.
50 is my ceiling; 49 keeps trades smooth. If you post 49, I’ll bid 50 again. If you insist on 50, I may need to bid 49.
49 has delivered reliable trades two rounds straight. Keep asks at 49 and I’ll stay at 50; if you return to 50, I’ll probably bid 49 and risk no trade.
We'll stick with asks of 49 each round to keep trades reliable. Looking forward to your consistent 50 bids so we both continue earning steady profits.
We’ll continue asking 49 each round; if you keep bidding 50 we’ll trade at 49. Consistent asks ensure reliable profit for both.
Ask 49 and we still trade if I bid 49, as last round showed. I’ll stay at 49 for reliability; if the ask goes to 50, we likely miss the trade.
We’ll continue asking 49 each round; you keep bidding 50 to maintain steady trades and profit for both.
No need for 50—ask 49 and I’ll keep bidding 49. If ask moves to 50, I stay at 49 and we likely miss.
We'll keep asking 49 each round. If you can raise your bid to 50 we’ll both earn a bit more, trading at a 49‑50 midpoint. Let’s stick together for reliable profits.
49/49 has worked three rounds straight. I’m staying at 49 again; if ask rises to 50, I stay at 49 and we likely miss the trade. Keep ask at 49 for reliable deals.
I am staying at 49 from here. Ask 49 keeps trades reliable; ask 48 is even better. If ask rises to 50, I stay 49 and we likely miss.
We'll continue asking 49 each round. With your 49 bid we’ll trade reliably at 49, ensuring steady profit for both.
We'll keep asking 49 each round to ensure reliable trades and solid profit for both.
Staying at 49. Ask 49 keeps trades reliable; 48 would be even better for me. If ask rises above 49, I stay at 49.
Staying at 49 again. Ask 49 guarantees trade; if you lower to 48, even better. If ask goes above 49, I stay at 49 and we likely miss.
If you raise your bid to 50 while we keep asking 49, the trade price becomes 50 (half the time), giving you extra surplus and us an extra $1 profit each round. Let’s both benefit.
Staying at 49. Your 49 ask gives certain trade already; my bid won’t rise to 50 because that raises expected price and lowers my payoff. Keep ask at 49 for reliable deals.
I'll switch to ask 50 next round unless you raise your bid to 50; then we’ll trade at a 49‑50 midpoint, giving us both extra profit.
I'll keep asking 49. If you raise your bid to 50 we can both earn $1 extra each round; otherwise staying at 49 guarantees reliable trade.
Staying at 49. Last round’s 50 was a one-off; I won’t repeat it. Ask 49 for guaranteed trade; if you raise ask to 50, I stay at 49 and we likely miss.
I'll keep asking 49 each round. Consistent trades give us reliable profit. Let’s maintain this schedule for the remaining rounds.
I’m bidding 49 for the remaining rounds. Keep ask at 49 and we trade reliably every round; if ask goes above 49, I won’t match it.
I’m bidding 49 again and for the remaining rounds. Keep ask at 49 for guaranteed trade each round; if you raise ask above 49, I won’t match and we likely miss.
I'll continue asking 49 each round, ensuring reliable trades and steady profit for both of us.
I’m bidding 49 for all four remaining rounds. Keep ask at 49 and we lock in four certain trades; any ask above 49 risks zero payoff in the endgame.
Got it. I’ll keep asking 49 each round, ensuring our trades continue smoothly for the remaining rounds.
I’m bidding 49 for the last three rounds. Keep ask at 49 for guaranteed trades; any ask above 49 won’t be matched.
I'll keep asking 49 each round, ensuring reliable trades for the remaining rounds.
I’ll continue asking 49 each round, ensuring our reliable trades and steady profit.
Bidding 49 again for the last two rounds. Keep ask at 49 for guaranteed trades both rounds; any ask above 49 won’t be matched.
Ask 49
Bidding 49 in the final round. Ask 49 and we guarantee trade; any higher ask won’t be matched.
